NBO CMO numbering is 1-based; ORCA orbital numbers are 0-based, so CMO MO N corresponds to ORCA MO N-1.

#### Canonical MO Character (NBO CMO)
Shown for canonical orbitals referenced by the dominant TDDFT/CIS excitations.
NBO CMO numbering is 1-based; ORCA orbital numbers are 0-based, so CMO MO N corresponds to ORCA MO N-1.
